Interface PixelDao

public interface PixelDao
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for Pixel entity. Declares CRUD operations for managing individual pixel data within layers.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LiveData<Integer>
    countByLayer(long layerId)
    Gets the count of pixels in a specific layer.
    int
    delete(Pixel pixel)
    Deletes a pixel from the database.
    int
    delete(Pixel... pixels)
    Deletes multiple pixels from the database.
    int
    deleteByColor(long layerId, int colorValue)
    Deletes all pixels of a specific color within a layer.
    int
    deleteByCoordinates(long layerId, int x, int y)
    Updates or inserts a pixel at specific coordinates (upsert operation).
    int
    deleteByLayer(long layerId)
    Deletes all pixels in a specific layer.

    Inserts a single pixel into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(Pixel... pixels)
    Inserts multiple pixels into the database.

    Inserts multiple pixels into the database.

    Retrieves a pixel by its ID.

    Retrieves all pixels of a specific color within a layer.
    LiveData<Pixel>

    Retrieves a specific pixel at the given coordinates within a layer.

    selectByLayer(long layerId)
    Retrieves all pixels for a specific layer.

    Retrieves pixels within a specific rectangular region of a layer.

    Updates an existing pixel in the database.

    Updates multiple existing pixels in the database.

    updateColor(long pixelId, int colorValue)
    Updates the color value of a specific pixel.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(Pixel pixel)
      Inserts a single pixel into the database.
      Parameters:
      pixel - Pixel instance to insert.
      Returns:
      ID of the newly inserted pixel.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Collection<Pixel> pixels)
      Inserts multiple pixels into the database.
      Parameters:
      pixels - Collection of pixels to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted pixels.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Pixel... pixels)
      Inserts multiple pixels into the database.
      Parameters:
      pixels - Variable number of pixels to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted pixels.

    • update

      int update(Pixel pixel)
      Updates an existing pixel in the database.
      Parameters:
      pixel - Pixel instance with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • update

      int update(Pixel... pixels)
      Updates multiple existing pixels in the database.
      Parameters:
      pixels - Variable number of pixels with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • delete

      int delete(Pixel pixel)
      Deletes a pixel from the database.
      Parameters:
      pixel - Pixel instance to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • delete

      int delete(Pixel... pixels)
      Deletes multiple pixels from the database.
      Parameters:
      pixels - Variable number of pixels to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • select

      LiveData<Pixel> select(long pixelId)
      Retrieves a pixel by its ID.
      Parameters:
      pixelId - Pixel ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the pixel, or null if not found.

    • selectByLayer

      LiveData<List<Pixel>> selectByLayer(long layerId)
      Retrieves all pixels for a specific layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of pixels for the specified layer.

    • selectByCoordinates

      LiveData<Pixel> selectByCoordinates(long layerId, int x, int y)
      Retrieves a specific pixel at the given coordinates within a layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      x - X coordinate.
      y - Y coordinate.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the pixel at the specified position, or null if not found.

    • selectByRegion

      LiveData<List<Pixel>> selectByRegion(long layerId, int minX, int maxX, int minY, int maxY)
      Retrieves pixels within a specific rectangular region of a layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      minX - Minimum X coordinate.
      maxX - Maximum X coordinate.
      minY - Minimum Y coordinate.
      maxY - Maximum Y coordinate.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of pixels within the specified region.

    • selectByColor

      LiveData<List<Pixel>> selectByColor(long layerId, int colorValue)
      Retrieves all pixels of a specific color within a layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      colorValue - Color value to search for.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of pixels with the specified color.

    • countByLayer

      LiveData<Integer> countByLayer(long layerId)
      Gets the count of pixels in a specific layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the number of pixels in the layer.

    • updateColor

      int updateColor(long pixelId, int colorValue)
      Updates the color value of a specific pixel.
      Parameters:
      pixelId - Pixel ID.
      colorValue - New color value.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • deleteByCoordinates

      int deleteByCoordinates(long layerId, int x, int y)
      Updates or inserts a pixel at specific coordinates (upsert operation). Deletes existing pixel and returns 0, or returns 0 if no pixel exists.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      x - X coordinate.
      y - Y coordinate.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted (for existing pixel).

    • deleteByLayer

      int deleteByLayer(long layerId)
      Deletes all pixels in a specific layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • deleteByColor

      int deleteByColor(long layerId, int colorValue)
      Deletes all pixels of a specific color within a layer.
      Parameters:
      layerId - Layer ID.
      colorValue - Color value to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.
